home.headline: Advanced systems for mission-critical environments.
home.subheadline: Electronic warfare, drone systems, and counter-UAV detection solutions engineered for real operational requirements.
home.domains_sub: Every product is positioned within a specific operational domain — from RF suppression and drone platforms to counter-UAV detection.
home.domain_ew_desc: Counter-UAV jammers, directional EW systems, airborne platforms, and RF shielding for fixed and mobile deployments.
home.domain_drone_desc: Heavy-lift, cargo, FPV strike, fixed-wing VTOL, and tactical reconnaissance UAVs for defense and civil operations.
home.domain_detect_desc: Radar, RF spectrum analysis, and AI optical systems for early warning, classification, and tracking of UAV threats.
home.featured_sub: Selected products across electronic warfare, drone operations, and counter-UAV protection.
home.approach_sub: We structure every engagement around operational context. From initial product fit to deployment planning, the process is built around your mission requirements.
home.step1_desc: Identify threat environment, deployment constraints, and operational objectives.
home.step2_desc: Align specific products and configurations to your operational requirements.
home.step3_desc: Structure integration, installation, training, and support around your timeline.
home.form_title: Tell us what you are evaluating.
home.form_sub: Share your product interest, mission profile, or deployment context and we will respond promptly.
home.form_message: Share your project scope, protection requirement, or mission need...
home.cta_banner_sub: Browse the full portfolio, filter by capability domain, and identify the systems aligned to your mission.

about.title: RDN Technology
about.subtitle: RDN Danışmanlık Yazılım Turizm Gıda Sanayi ve Dış Ticaret Limited Şirketi
about.desc1: Based in Ankara, Turkey, RDN Technology develops and positions advanced defense and security systems — from electronic warfare and counter-UAV platforms to detection systems and AI-based security technologies.
about.desc2: We work with defense institutions, security organizations, and critical infrastructure operators to align technology capability with real operational requirements.
about.sectors_desc: RDN Technology serves organizations operating in security-sensitive and mission-critical environments.
about.cta_title: Discuss your requirements with our team.
about.cta_sub: From product fit to full deployment planning — contact us to start the right conversation.
about.cap_ew: Advanced RF suppression, counter-UAV jammers, directional EW systems, airborne platforms, and tactical protection technologies.
about.cap_drone: Heavy-lift cargo drones, tactical FPV platforms, fixed-wing VTOL UAVs, and reconnaissance systems for defense and civil operations.
about.cap_detect: Radar, RF spectrum analysis, and AI optical UAV detection systems providing early warning and automatic classification.
about.cap_ai: Biometric recognition, AI-supported monitoring, and real-time situational awareness technologies.
about.cap_c4i: Integrated voice, data, radio, and video communication systems for mobile, fixed, and tactical environments.
about.val1_text: Every product is structured around real operational requirements — not generic catalog listings.
about.val2_text: Our portfolio spans electronic warfare, drone systems, and counter-UAV detection as a unified capability ecosystem.
about.val3_text: Systems designed to grow with mission requirements while remaining deployable, maintainable, and field-ready.

contact.title: Let's discuss your operational requirements.
contact.subtitle: Contact RDN Technology for product information, solution architecture, deployment models, or project-based evaluations.
contact.form_title: Tell us what you are evaluating.
contact.form_sub: Share your project scope, product interest, or mission requirement and we will respond promptly.
contact.response_text: We typically respond to all inquiries within 1 business day. For urgent project evaluations, please indicate your timeline in the message.
